title: Uruguayan Beef Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew from Uruguay, featuring slow-cooked beef and a rich, flavorful broth.

ingredients.name: beef
ingredients.amount: 1.5 pounds beef chuck or brisket, cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef in batches, then set it aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened.
Add the wine (if using) and cook until almost completely evaporated.
Add the beef broth and tomato paste. Stir to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
